category: Physical components directly used in the staging of a theatrical performance
explanation: Spotlight, Curtain, Microphone, and Props are all tangible items or equipment that form part of the physical setup or execution on a stage for a theatrical performance. The Audience consists of the observers and is not a physical component of the stage production itself.

category: Animals on National Flags or Official Heraldic Emblems
explanation: Dragon (Wales), Lion (England, Sri Lanka), Eagle (USA, Mexico), and Kangaroo (Australia) are all animals that feature prominently on the national flags or official heraldic emblems of various countries. The Panda, while a national animal and cultural symbol of China, does not appear on China's national flag or its national emblem.

Novel, Essay, Poem, and Journal (referring to a periodical or diary) are all distinct genres or types of written content. A Scroll, however, is a physical format or medium used to store or display written material, rather than a type of content itself.
